scripts.build: npm run build -w @database-mcp/core && npm run build -w @database-mcp/sqlite && npm run build -w @database-mcp/libsql && npm run build -w @database-mcp/mysql && npm run build -w @database-mcp/mariadb
scripts.conformance: node conformance/run.mjs -- node sqlite/typescript/dist/index.js && node conformance/run.mjs -- node libsql/typescript/dist/index.js && node conformance/run.mjs --engine mysql -- node mysql/typescript/dist/index.js && node conformance/run.mjs --engine mariadb -- node mariadb/typescript/dist/index.js
